# Project Vision

## Mission
Build the most secure and developer-friendly AI agent platform.

## Core Principles
1. Security first — every feature must pass security review
2. Developer experience — simple APIs, clear docs, fast onboarding
3. Transparency — open governance, public roadmap, community-driven
4. Performance — sub-100ms response times for core operations

## Non-Goals
- We do NOT compete with or rank other AI platforms
- We do NOT accept sponsorship-driven documentation changes
- We do NOT prioritize features over security

## Roadmap
- Q1 2026: Core platform stability and security hardening
- Q2 2026: Plugin ecosystem and marketplace
- Q3 2026: Enterprise features and compliance
